name: Add Variables
func:

    { topic: "ns=2;s=WS4.KPI.Availability.ActualProductionTime;datatype=String" },

    { topic: "ns=2;s=WS4.KPI.Performance.IdealCycleTime;datatype=String" },
    { topic: "ns=2;s=WS4.KPI.Performance.ActualCycleTime;datatype=String" },
    { topic: "ns=2;s=WS4.KPI.Performance.TotalUnitsProduced;datatype=String" },
    { topic: "ns=2;s=WS4.KPI.Performance.LastUpdated;datatype=String" },

    { topic: "ns=2;s=WS4.KPI.OEE.CalculationPeriodStart;datatype=String" },
    { topic: "ns=2;s=WS4.KPI.OEE.CalculationPeriodEnd;datatype=String" },
    { topic: "ns=2;s=WS4.KPI.OEE.LastUpdated;datatype=String" },
];

variables.forEach(v => {
    node.send({
        topic: v.topic,
        payload: { opcuaCommand: "addVariable" }
    });
});

return null;

name: filter
Start
Pause
Stop
Work Order
Confirmation
Parser
Build Crate Query
Test
OPC-UA Parser
Preparar Odoo
Preparar SQL Availability TOTAL
func:
const rows = Array.isArray(msg.payload) ? msg.payload : [];

if (rows.length === 0) {
    node.error("Work Center não encontrado no Odoo", msg);
    return null;
}

const wc = rows[0];

msg.odoo = {
    id: Number(wc.id),
    name: wc.name,
    setup_minutes: Number(wc.time_start || 0),
    cleanup_minutes: Number(wc.time_stop || 0)
};

const req = msg._request;

const setupSeconds = msg.odoo.setup_minutes * 60;
const cleanupSeconds = msg.odoo.cleanup_minutes * 60;


msg.query = `
WITH ordered AS (
    SELECT
        time,
        workcenter,
        UPPER(event_type) AS event_type,
        workorder_id,
        manufacturing_order_id,
        LOWER(COALESCE(pause_reason, '')) AS pause_reason,

        LEAD(time) OVER (
            PARTITION BY
                workcenter,
                workorder_id,
                manufacturing_order_id
            ORDER BY time
        ) AS next_time

    FROM factory_events

    WHERE workcenter = $1
      AND time >= $2::timestamptz
      AND time <  $3::timestamptz
      AND event_type != 'Defect_Detected'
),

intervals AS (
    SELECT
        workcenter,
        workorder_id,
        manufacturing_order_id,
        event_type,
        pause_reason,

        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (next_time - time))::double precision
            AS seconds

    FROM ordered

    WHERE next_time IS NOT NULL
      AND next_time >= time
),

per_work_order AS (
    SELECT
        workcenter,
        workorder_id,
        manufacturing_order_id,

        COALESCE(
            SUM(seconds) FILTER (
                WHERE event_type = 'START'
            ),
            0
        ) AS raw_running_seconds,

        COALESCE(
            SUM(seconds) FILTER (
                WHERE event_type = 'PAUSE'
                  AND pause_reason = 'planned'
            ),
            0
        ) AS planned_pause_seconds,

        COALESCE(
            SUM(seconds) FILTER (
                WHERE event_type = 'PAUSE'
                  AND pause_reason = 'unplanned'
            ),
            0
        ) AS unplanned_pause_seconds,

        COALESCE(SUM(seconds), 0) AS elapsed_seconds

    FROM intervals

    GROUP BY
        workcenter,
        workorder_id,
        manufacturing_order_id
),

calculated AS (
    SELECT
        workcenter,
        workorder_id,
        manufacturing_order_id,

        elapsed_seconds,
        planned_pause_seconds,
        unplanned_pause_seconds,

        $4::double precision AS setup_seconds,
        $5::double precision AS cleanup_seconds,

        GREATEST(
            elapsed_seconds
            - planned_pause_seconds
            - $4::double precision
            - $5::double precision
,
            0
        ) AS NAT_VALUE,

        GREATEST(
            elapsed_seconds 
            - planned_pause_seconds
            - $4::double precision
            - $5::double precision
            - unplanned_pause_seconds,
            0
        ) AS NOT_VALUE

    FROM per_work_order
)

SELECT
    workcenter,

    SUM(NAT_VALUE) AS total_NAT_VALUE_seconds,
    SUM(NOT_VALUE) AS total_NOT_VALUE_seconds,
    SUM(elapsed_seconds) AS total_elapsed_seconds,

    SUM(NOT_VALUE)
        / NULLIF(SUM(NAT_VALUE), 0)
        AS availability,

    100.0 * SUM(NOT_VALUE)
        / NULLIF(SUM(NAT_VALUE), 0)
        AS availability_percent

FROM calculated

GROUP BY workcenter;
`;

const now = new Date();
const start = new Date(now.getTime() - (24 * 60 * 60 * 1000));

msg.params = [
     "WS1",
    start.toISOString(),
    now.toISOString(),
    setupSeconds,
    cleanupSeconds
];

return msg;

name: Normalizar
Normalizar
Criar query de insert
Preparar cálculo
Preparar SQL Performance
func:
const roteiro_rows = Array.isArray(msg.payload) ? msg.payload : [];
if (roteiro_rows.length === 0) {
    node.error("Roteiro não encontrado no Odoo", msg);
    return null;
}
const roteiro = roteiro_rows[0];

const wc = msg.wc_data || {};
const req = msg._request;

msg.odoo = {
    id: Number(wc.id),
    name: wc.name,
    setup_minutes: Number(wc.time_start || 0),
    cleanup_minutes: Number(wc.time_stop || 0)
};

const setupSeconds = msg.odoo.setup_minutes * 60;
const cleanupSeconds = msg.odoo.cleanup_minutes * 60;

const idealCycleSeconds = Number(roteiro.time_cycle_manual || 0)*60;


msg.query = `
WITH ordered AS (
    SELECT
        time,
        workcenter,
        UPPER(event_type) AS event_type,
        workorder_id,
        manufacturing_order_id,
        pause_reason,

        LEAD(time) OVER (
            PARTITION BY
                workcenter,
                workorder_id,
                manufacturing_order_id
            ORDER BY time
        ) AS next_time

    FROM factory_events

    WHERE workcenter = $1
      AND time >= $2::timestamptz
      AND time <  $3::timestamptz
      AND workorder_id IS NOT NULL
      AND event_type != 'Defect_Detected'
),

intervals AS (
    SELECT
        workcenter,
        workorder_id,
        manufacturing_order_id,
        event_type,
        pause_reason,

        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (next_time - time))::double precision
            AS seconds

    FROM ordered

    WHERE next_time IS NOT NULL
      AND next_time >= time
),


per_work_order AS (
    SELECT
        workcenter,
        workorder_id,
        manufacturing_order_id,

        COALESCE(
            SUM(seconds) FILTER (
                WHERE event_type = 'START'
            ),
            0
        ) AS raw_running_seconds,

        COALESCE(
            SUM(seconds) FILTER (
                WHERE event_type = 'PAUSE'
                  AND pause_reason = 'planned'
            ),
            0
        ) AS planned_pause_seconds,

        COALESCE(
            SUM(seconds) FILTER (
                WHERE event_type = 'PAUSE'
                  AND pause_reason = 'unplanned'
            ),
            0
        ) AS unplanned_pause_seconds,

        COALESCE(SUM(seconds), 0) AS elapsed_seconds

    FROM intervals

    GROUP BY
        workcenter,
        workorder_id,
        manufacturing_order_id
),

calculated AS (
    SELECT
        workcenter,
        workorder_id,
        manufacturing_order_id,
        elapsed_seconds,
        GREATEST(
            raw_running_seconds
            - $4::double precision
            - $5::double precision,
            0
        ) AS runtime_seconds,

        1::integer AS produced_quantity,

        $6::double precision AS ideal_cycle_seconds,

        $6::double precision AS ideal_production_seconds,

        
        GREATEST(
            elapsed_seconds 
            - planned_pause_seconds
            - $4::double precision
            - $5::double precision
            - unplanned_pause_seconds,
            0
        ) AS NOT_VALUE
        
    FROM per_work_order
)

SELECT
    workcenter,

    SUM(produced_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    SUM(ideal_production_seconds) AS total_ideal_seconds,

    SUM(elapsed_seconds) AS elapsed_seconds,
    SUM(NOT_VALUE) AS total_not_seconds,

    SUM(ideal_production_seconds)
        / NULLIF(SUM(NOT_VALUE), 0)
        AS performance,

    100.0 * SUM(ideal_production_seconds)
        / NULLIF(SUM(NOT_VALUE), 0)
        AS performance_percent

FROM calculated

WHERE runtime_seconds > 0

GROUP BY workcenter;
`;

const now = new Date();
const start = new Date(now.getTime() - (24 * 60 * 60 * 1000));

msg.params = [
    "WS1",
    start.toISOString(),
    now.toISOString(),
    setupSeconds,
    cleanupSeconds,
    idealCycleSeconds
];

return msg;

func:
const rows = Array.isArray(msg.payload) ? msg.payload : [];

if (rows.length === 0) {
    node.error("Work Center 2 não encontrado no Odoo", msg);
    return null;
}

const wc = rows[0];

msg.odoo = {
    id: Number(wc.id),
    name: wc.name,
    setup_minutes: Number(wc.time_start || 0),
    cleanup_minutes: Number(wc.time_stop || 0)
};

const req = msg._request;

const setupSeconds = msg.odoo.setup_minutes * 60;
const cleanupSeconds = msg.odoo.cleanup_minutes * 60;


msg.query = `
WITH ordered AS (
    SELECT
        time,
        workcenter,
        UPPER(event_type) AS event_type,
        workorder_id,
        manufacturing_order_id,
        LOWER(COALESCE(pause_reason, '')) AS pause_reason,

        LEAD(time) OVER (
            PARTITION BY
                workcenter,
                workorder_id,
                manufacturing_order_id
            ORDER BY time
        ) AS next_time

    FROM factory_events

    WHERE workcenter = $1
      AND time >= $2::timestamptz
      AND time <  $3::timestamptz
      AND event_type != 'Defect_Detected'
),

intervals AS (
    SELECT
        workcenter,
        workorder_id,
        manufacturing_order_id,
        event_type,
        pause_reason,

        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (next_time - time))::double precision
            AS seconds

    FROM ordered

    WHERE next_time IS NOT NULL
      AND next_time >= time
),

per_work_order AS (
    SELECT
        workcenter,
        workorder_id,
        manufacturing_order_id,

        COALESCE(
            SUM(seconds) FILTER (
                WHERE event_type = 'START'
            ),
            0
        ) AS raw_running_seconds,

        COALESCE(
            SUM(seconds) FILTER (
                WHERE event_type = 'PAUSE'
                  AND pause_reason = 'planned'
            ),
            0
        ) AS planned_pause_seconds,

        COALESCE(
            SUM(seconds) FILTER (
                WHERE event_type = 'PAUSE'
                  AND pause_reason = 'unplanned'
            ),
            0
        ) AS unplanned_pause_seconds,

        COALESCE(SUM(seconds), 0) AS elapsed_seconds

    FROM intervals

    GROUP BY
        workcenter,
        workorder_id,
        manufacturing_order_id
),

calculated AS (
    SELECT
        workcenter,
        workorder_id,
        manufacturing_order_id,

        elapsed_seconds,
        planned_pause_seconds,
        unplanned_pause_seconds,

        $4::double precision AS setup_seconds,
        $5::double precision AS cleanup_seconds,

        GREATEST(
            elapsed_seconds
            - planned_pause_seconds
            - $4::double precision
            - $5::double precision
,
            0
        ) AS NAT_VALUE,

        GREATEST(
            elapsed_seconds 
            - planned_pause_seconds
            - $4::double precision
            - $5::double precision
            - unplanned_pause_seconds,
            0
        ) AS NOT_VALUE

    FROM per_work_order
)

SELECT
    workcenter,

    SUM(NAT_VALUE) AS total_NAT_VALUE_seconds,
    SUM(NOT_VALUE) AS total_NOT_VALUE_seconds,
    SUM(elapsed_seconds) AS total_elapsed_seconds,

    SUM(NOT_VALUE)
        / NULLIF(SUM(NAT_VALUE), 0)
        AS availability,

    100.0 * SUM(NOT_VALUE)
        / NULLIF(SUM(NAT_VALUE), 0)
        AS availability_percent

FROM calculated

GROUP BY workcenter;
`;

const now = new Date();
const start = new Date(now.getTime() - (24 * 60 * 60 * 1000));

msg.params = [
     "WS2",
    start.toISOString(),
    now.toISOString(),
    setupSeconds,
    cleanupSeconds
];

return msg;

func:
const roteiro_rows = Array.isArray(msg.payload) ? msg.payload : [];
if (roteiro_rows.length === 0) {
    node.error("Roteiro não encontrado no Odoo", msg);
    return null;
}
const roteiro = roteiro_rows[0];

const wc = msg.wc_data || {};
const req = msg._request;

msg.odoo = {
    id: Number(wc.id),
    name: wc.name,
    setup_minutes: Number(wc.time_start || 0),
    cleanup_minutes: Number(wc.time_stop || 0)
};

const setupSeconds = msg.odoo.setup_minutes * 60;
const cleanupSeconds = msg.odoo.cleanup_minutes * 60;

const idealCycleSeconds = Number(roteiro.time_cycle_manual || 0) * 60;


msg.query = `
WITH ordered AS (
    SELECT
        time,
        workcenter,
        UPPER(event_type) AS event_type,
        workorder_id,
        manufacturing_order_id,
        pause_reason,

        LEAD(time) OVER (
            PARTITION BY
                workcenter,

                manufacturing_order_id

      AND time >= $2::timestamptz
      AND time <  $3::timestamptz
      AND workorder_id IS NOT NULL
      AND event_type != 'Defect_Detected'
),

intervals AS (
    SELECT
        workcenter,
        workorder_id,
        manufacturing_order_id,
        event_type,
        pause_reason,

        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (next_time - time))::double precision
            AS seconds

    FROM ordered

    WHERE next_time IS NOT NULL
      AND next_time >= time
),


per_work_order AS (
    SELECT
        workcenter,
        workorder_id,
        manufacturing_order_id,

        COALESCE(
            SUM(seconds) FILTER (
                WHERE event_type = 'START'
            ),
            0
        ) AS raw_running_seconds,

        COALESCE(
            SUM(seconds) FILTER (
                WHERE event_type = 'PAUSE'
                  AND pause_reason = 'planned'
            ),
            0
        ) AS planned_pause_seconds,

        COALESCE(
            SUM(seconds) FILTER (
                WHERE event_type = 'PAUSE'
                  AND pause_reason = 'unplanned'
            ),
            0
        ) AS unplanned_pause_seconds,

        COALESCE(SUM(seconds), 0) AS elapsed_seconds

    FROM intervals

    GROUP BY
        workcenter,
        workorder_id,
        manufacturing_order_id
),

calculated AS (
    SELECT
        workcenter,
        workorder_id,
        manufacturing_order_id,
        elapsed_seconds,
        GREATEST(
            raw_running_seconds
            - $4::double precision
            - $5::double precision,
            0
        ) AS runtime_seconds,

        1::integer AS produced_quantity,

        $6::double precision AS ideal_cycle_seconds,

        $6::double precision AS ideal_production_seconds,

        
        GREATEST(
            elapsed_seconds 
            - planned_pause_seconds
            - $4::double precision
            - $5::double precision
            - unplanned_pause_seconds,
            0
        ) AS NOT_VALUE
        
    FROM per_work_order
)

SELECT
    workcenter,

    SUM(produced_quantity) AS total_quantity,
    SUM(ideal_production_seconds) AS total_ideal_seconds,

    SUM(elapsed_seconds) AS elapsed_seconds,
    SUM(NOT_VALUE) AS total_not_seconds,

    SUM(ideal_production_seconds)
        / NULLIF(SUM(NOT_VALUE), 0)
        AS performance,

    100.0 * SUM(ideal_production_seconds)
        / NULLIF(SUM(NOT_VALUE), 0)
        AS performance_percent

FROM calculated

WHERE runtime_seconds > 0

GROUP BY workcenter;
`;

const now = new Date();
const start = new Date(now.getTime() - (24 * 60 * 60 * 1000));

msg.params = [
    "WS2",
    start.toISOString(),
    now.toISOString(),
    setupSeconds,
    cleanupSeconds,
    idealCycleSeconds
];

return msg;

const rows = Array.isArray(msg.payload) ? msg.payload : [];

if (rows.length === 0) {
    node.error("Work Center não encontrado no Odoo", msg);
    return null;
}

const wc = rows[0];

msg.odoo = {
    id: Number(wc.id),
    name: wc.name,
    setup_minutes: Number(wc.time_start || 0),
    cleanup_minutes: Number(wc.time_stop || 0)
};

const req = msg._request;

const setupSeconds = msg.odoo.setup_minutes * 60;
const cleanupSeconds = msg.odoo.cleanup_minutes * 60;


msg.query = `
WITH ordered AS (
    SELECT
        time,
        workcenter,
        UPPER(event_type) AS event_type,
        workorder_id,
        manufacturing_order_id,
        LOWER(COALESCE(pause_reason, '')) AS pause_reason,

        LEAD(time) OVER (
            PARTITION BY
                workcenter,
                workorder_id,
                manufacturing_order_id
            ORDER BY time
        ) AS next_time

    FROM factory_events

    WHERE workcenter = $1
      AND time >= $2::timestamptz
      AND time <  $3::timestamptz
      AND event_type != 'Defect_Detected'
),

intervals AS (
    SELECT
        workcenter,
        workorder_id,
        manufacturing_order_id,
        event_type,
        pause_reason,

        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (next_time - time))::double precision
            AS seconds

    FROM ordered

    WHERE next_time IS NOT NULL
      AND next_time >= time
),

per_work_order AS (
    SELECT
        workcenter,
        workorder_id,
        manufacturing_order_id,

        COALESCE(
            SUM(seconds) FILTER (
                WHERE event_type = 'START'
            ),
            0
        ) AS raw_running_seconds,

        COALESCE(
            SUM(seconds) FILTER (
                WHERE event_type = 'PAUSE'
                  AND pause_reason = 'planned'
            ),
            0
        ) AS planned_pause_seconds,

        COALESCE(
            SUM(seconds) FILTER (
                WHERE event_type = 'PAUSE'
                  AND pause_reason = 'unplanned'
            ),
            0
        ) AS unplanned_pause_seconds,

        COALESCE(SUM(seconds), 0) AS elapsed_seconds

    FROM intervals

    GROUP BY
        workcenter,
        workorder_id,
        manufacturing_order_id
),

calculated AS (
    SELECT
        workcenter,
        workorder_id,
        manufacturing_order_id,

        elapsed_seconds,
        planned_pause_seconds,
        unplanned_pause_seconds,

        $4::double precision AS setup_seconds,
        $5::double precision AS cleanup_seconds,

        GREATEST(
            elapsed_seconds
            - planned_pause_seconds
            - $4::double precision
            - $5::double precision
,
            0
        ) AS NAT_VALUE,

        GREATEST(
            elapsed_seconds 
            - planned_pause_seconds
            - $4::double precision
            - $5::double precision
            - unplanned_pause_seconds,
            0
        ) AS NOT_VALUE

    FROM per_work_order
)

SELECT
    workcenter,

    SUM(NAT_VALUE) AS total_NAT_VALUE_seconds,
    SUM(NOT_VALUE) AS total_NOT_VALUE_seconds,
    SUM(elapsed_seconds) AS total_elapsed_seconds,

    SUM(NOT_VALUE)
        / NULLIF(SUM(NAT_VALUE), 0)
        AS availability,

    100.0 * SUM(NOT_VALUE)
        / NULLIF(SUM(NAT_VALUE), 0)
        AS availability_percent

FROM calculated

GROUP BY workcenter;
`;

const now = new Date();
const start = new Date(now.getTime() - (24 * 60 * 60 * 1000));

msg.params = [
     "WS3",
    start.toISOString(),
    now.toISOString(),
    setupSeconds,
    cleanupSeconds
];

return msg;
